relics.name: Broken Resolve
relics.description: Weak effectiveness is doubled, up to a maximum of 50%.
relics.flavorText: "Try as I might, I just can't help but feel the sting of being spurned. And I don't like it, not a little bit. So now I have to sting you back!"

relics.name: Different League
relics.description: You take 3 less damage from enemy attacks.
relics.flavorText: "We're just two lovely goddesses together having a night out!"

relics.name: Flutter Flourish
relics.description: Every 4th Skill you play is free.
relics.flavorText: "The more distracted you can make them, the easier they are to kill!"

relics.name: Glamour Gain
relics.description: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain [E].
relics.flavorText: "Why, you look positively stunning in all that silver light!"

relics.name: Healthy Rebound
relics.description: At the start of each Normal/Elite/Boss combat, heal 5/15/Full HP.
relics.flavorText: "Though don't despair! Your heart yet beats, doesn't it?"

relics.name: Heartbreak Strike
relics.description: Your Attacks deal 10% more damage for each Weak on the enemy and apply 1 Weak on every hit.
relics.flavorText: "At this rate, you'll end up breaking more hearts than me!"

relics.name: Nervous Wreck
relics.description: Whenever you apply debuffs on enemies, apply twice as much.
relics.flavorText: "Our emotions ran a little hot there, didn't they... I still can feel my heart racing, and if I'm not mistaken, yours might have been, too!"

relics.name: Shameless Attitude
relics.description: Your Attacks deal 33.(3)% more damage. If you have 50% HP or more, your Attacks deal 66.(6)% more damage instead.
relics.flavorText: "Oh, gorgeous. If pride and vanity are truly weaknesses, then I'm about to let myself be very vulnerable with you here..."

relics.name: Sisyphus' Aid
relics.description: At the start of each combat, Rolling Boulder is played for free.
relics.flavorText: "Bouldy says whatever we can do to help, we'll do it!"

relics.name: Spiritual Affirmation
relics.description: Upon pickup, gain 16 Max HP and 499 Gold.
relics.flavorText: "As long as you have love in your heart, you'll probably be fine!"

relics.name: Sweet Nectar
relics.description: Whenever you Smith at a Rest Site, upgrade 4 other random cards.

relics.name: Sweet Surrender
relics.description: Whenever you apply Weak, apply the same amount of Vulnerable and Charm.
relics.flavorText: "Between us goddesses, may you kill everybody standing in your way!"

keywords.name: Charm
keywords.description: Whenever this creature obtains 6 stacks, it's stunned.

mods.name: Aphrodite Ancient
mods.description: This mod adds Aphrodite from the hit game Hades 2 as a new Ancient.
